SPEAKING

VOLUMES.

I’m a 15-year-old independent electronic music producer blending Dubstep, Future Bass, Electro Pop, and other electronic genres to create immersive soundscapes that fit any mood. Inspired by artists like oomiee, Levi Niha, and AGST, my music explores a wide spectrum of emotions, ranging from euphoric highs to melancholic depths. I’ve been producing since I was 11, shaping a signature sound built on powerful basslines, distorted vocals, and cinematic atmospheres. Every track I release is fully self-produced, reflecting my passion for sound design and storytelling. Even as a dedicated hobbyist, I’m constantly pushing boundaries, chasing new ways to craft tracks that resonate with people on a personal level. Whether you’re looking for energy, introspection, or just something to vibe to, I aim to deliver music that sticks with you long after the last note.

LATEST MUSIC



Midnight Summers

Studying, sleeping or working? Midnight Summers is a chill, lo-fi track that blends smooth beats with dreamy sounds to create a relaxing atmosphere. Perfect for unwinding or adding a laid-back vibe to any moment, its soothing soundscape helps bring peace and reflection into mind.

Hyperduck

Hyperduck is an euphoric Future Bass track released on August 14th, 2025. Bursting with uplifting melodies, emotional depth, and contagious energy, it captures both joy and nostalgia in a way that listeners can’t help but replay.

Nightlight

Nightlight drifts between Chillstep, Future Bass, and Lo-Fi, delivering a relaxing beat that feels both soothing and cinematic. With mellow melodies and gentle textures, it creates the perfect backdrop for unwinding or adding atmosphere to almost any video.

Marshmallows

Marshmallows is an upbeat, fast-paced future bass track bursting with energy and color. With playful melodies and driving rhythms, it captures a carefree, feel-good vibe that lifts the mood instantly.





PAST MUSIC



Silveris

Silveris is a five-track collection that captures my full transformation as a producer, moving from energetic future bass into vibrant electro pop. Each track reflects a different stage of growth, blending catchy melodies with evolving styles to showcase how my sound has matured and expanded.

Iridescent

Iridescent is a fast, upbeat future bass track that quickly became a fan favorite. With colorful melodies and infectious energy, it shines through with its vibrant sound and undeniable danceability.

In The FLAMES

In The FLAMES is a dark, driving drum & bass track built on heavy rhythms, deep synths, and an eerie atmosphere. Its haunting energy creates a cinematic feel, pulling listeners into a tense and immersive soundscape that lingers long after it ends.

Leap

Leap is my debut release, a two-track single full of upbeat, video game–style energy. With bright synths and playful melodies, it captures the excitement of taking my very first step into music production.
